data.body: HANDOFF (2026-07-08): OPEN, NO plan-review yet -> run rebar review-plan 9622 BEFORE claiming (plan-review-for-claim gate is ON). Added to epic by the 2026-07-08 audit. Wire 3 dead reconciler safety mechanisms into production: bind_pending write-ahead (dispatch_one.py create->label crash window double-creates), lease steal(), retry-layer error translation. Overlaps C2's binding concerns — consider sequencing with C2.
